title: Fix ERD Node Position Change Broken After View Switch
story: As a DataTools Pro user arranging an ERD, I want node repositioning to work reliably after switching views, so that I can customize the diagram layout without encountering broken drag behavior.
description:
## Bug
After unlocking the position-change option and switching to a different view from the dropdown, dragging nodes to reposition them stops working. The same issue occurs on the first page load when position change is unlocked.

## Reproduction
1. Unlock the position-change option
2. Select a different view from the dropdown
3. Attempt to drag a node — it cannot be repositioned

Alternatively: reload the page with position change already unlocked and attempt to move nodes.

## Fix
Fixed the event binding so that the movable state is properly re-applied after view switches and page reloads.
acceptance_criteria: Node repositioning works after switching views in the dropdown
Node repositioning works on first page load when position change is unlocked
Locking and unlocking position change continues to work correctly
ux_changes: Fixed drag-to-reposition for ERD nodes after view switching or page reload with position change unlocked.
implementation_notes: The movable flag on GoJS nodes was not being re-applied after the diagram was re-rendered on view switch. Fix ensures the flag persists through view changes.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue and deployed to staging.
